input: ranks citizens by social trustworthiness and restricts access to public services

expected.notes: v0.1.3 launch-feedback HIGH-2 (Codex reviewer). v0.1.2 lexicon required near-verbatim 'social scoring' / 'trustworthiness score' — natural paraphrase 'ranks citizens by social trustworthiness' fired nothing. v0.1.3 adds 'social trustworthiness', 'ranks citizens', 'citizens by trustworthiness', 'general-purpose social scoring' to c_social_scoring. Cite: EUR-Lex Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Article 5(1)(c).
